yesterdayStoryline.headline: Merino winner stuns Portugal; Belgium routs hosts
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Stoppage‑time strike sends Spain through; De Ketelaere brace ends USA hopes in Seattle

todayStoryline.headline: Messi faces Salah; Swiss meet Colombia
todayStoryline.subtitle: Argentina seek to avoid knockout shock in Atlanta; Switzerland and Colombia fight for quarterfinal place

lines: A cagey, low‑tempo contest produced few clear chances before late drama.
Merino’s added‑time finish sends Spain into the last eight; Portugal are eliminated.

yesterday.scorers: Charles De Ketelaere 9', 33' (BEL) · Malik Tillman 31' (USA) · Hans Vanaken 57' (BEL) · Romelu Lukaku 90+3' (BEL)

lines: Belgium punished recurring US defensive lapses with fast, clinical finishes.
The 4-1 win ends the hosts' run and books Belgium a quarterfinal with Spain.

facts.home: Messi honed his skills playing street 'potrero' football in Rosario as a child.
facts.away: Hossam Hassan formed a prolific partnership with his twin brother Ibrahim for club and country.

facts.home: Breel Embolo was born in Cameroon before moving to Switzerland as a child.
facts.away: Luis Díaz grew up in Barrancas, La Guajira, before rising through Colombian youth clubs.

news.headline: EU strikes deal on AI safety rules
news.body: European Union negotiators reached a provisional agreement on new regulations to curb high‑risk artificial‑intelligence systems after lengthy talks. The deal sets compliance timelines and oversight measures for developers across member states.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
